utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. All 6 items are present in the final property solution. Each item is fully detailed: 1) property includes type, location, price, features, and move-in date; 2) financing includes purchase method, down payment, mortgage details, interest rate, amortization, and approximate monthly payment; 3) legal_services lists service type, cost, and included services; 4) moving_services specifies cost, currency, service level, included services, and flexibility; 5) setup_services includes utility package, cost, services, and inspection fees; 6) total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown with property cost, fees, total costs, and timeline. All required details are present and fully specified.
